{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Nafir Nuren
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Nafir Nuren]] is the leader of the [[Nuren]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Nafir Nuren]] is at least sixty years old.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
